name: Role/page action validation: forbidden mutation rejected at policy layer (not silent client drop)
method: Anon client (no auth claim → no `squadron_id()` function returns NULL) attempts a NOTAM INSERT. The notams_rw policy requires `squadron_id = squadron_id()` — must reject. Counter-check: a successful INSERT here would be a silent-fail bug.

observed.error_message: new row violates row-level security policy for table "notams"
